finding: Near-conflict examined and dismissed: KCl 20 mEq/100 mL appears as a routine calc order in one item and as a concentration exceeding the usual peripheral limit (~10 mEq/100 mL) in the other; the calc item states no route and makes no peripheral-safety claim, so reconciliation is stronger than the conflict (Hedge Rule).
